# Collaborative Software Development {#sec-collab-dev}

This chapter covers the social side of writing code together:
opening pull requests,
reviewing each other's work,
and responding to review feedback.

## Pull Requests {#sec-pull-requests}

### Pull request roles {#sec-pr-roles}

{{< include collaborative-software-development/_pull-request-roles.qmd >}}

### Opening pull requests {#sec-opening-pull-requests}

{{< include collaborative-software-development/_opening-pull-requests.qmd >}}

## Code Review {#sec-code-review}

### Reviewing pull requests {#sec-reviewing-pull-requests}

{{< include collaborative-software-development/_reviewing-pull-requests.qmd >}}

### Responding to review comments {#sec-responding-to-review-comments}

{{< include collaborative-software-development/_responding-to-review-comments.qmd >}}

### Avoid closing and restarting pull requests {#sec-avoid-closing-restarting-prs}

{{< include collaborative-software-development/_avoid-closing-and-restarting.qmd >}}
